Wherever the princess goes, her musketeers are

data.flavor_text:
"I am Moana of Motunui. You will board my boat, sail
across the sea, and restore the heart of Te Fiti."

data.name: Mr. Smee
data.flavor_text:
"Mr. Smee is a kind, gentle soul who lives to bring
comfort and aid to a twisted old villain. Now, what
good is kindness like that?"
—Peter Pan

data.flavor_text: "The time has come to take what is ours!"

data.name: Sergeant Tibbs
data.flavor_text: "Yes, sir. Righto, sir. Right away, sir!"

data.name: Stitch
data.flavor_text:
"His destructive programming is taking effect. He will
be irresistibly drawn to large cities, where he will back
up sewers, reverse street signs, and steal everyone's
left shoe."
—Jumba Jookiba

data.name: Te Kā

keywords.name: Reckless
keywords.text: (This character can't quest and must challenge each turn if able.)

data.flavor_text: She burns for that which was stolen from her.

data.name: Tigger

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

data.flavor_text: "I'm the bounciest bouncer that ever bounced!"

data.name: Be Prepared
rules: (A character with cost 7 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Banish all characters.
data.flavor_text: Our teeth and ambitions are bared!

data.name: Cut to the Chase
rules: Chosen character gains Rush this turn. (They can challenge the turn they're played.)
data.flavor_text: "Surprise!"

data.name: Dragon Fire
rules: Banish chosen character.
data.flavor_text: Rare is the hero who can withstand a dragon's wrath.

data.name: Fan the Flames
rules: Ready chosen character. They can't quest for the rest of this turn.
data.flavor_text: Pretty words can move a crowd, but so can ugly ones.

data.name: He's Got a Sword!
rules: Chosen character gets +2 {Strength} this turn.
data.flavor_text:
"We've all got swords!"
—Razoul

data.name: Tangle
rules: Each opponent loses 1 lore.
data.flavor_text:
"Stay right there! I mean, you don't have a choice, I
guess. But still! Don't move!"
—Rapunzel

data.name: Poisoned Apple

abilities.name: Take a Bite...
abilities.text: {Exert} — Exert chosen character. If a Princess character is chosen, banish her instead.

data.source: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs
data.flavor_text:
"One taste of the poisoned apple, and the victim's eyes
will close forever...."
—The Queen

data.name: Shield of Virtue

abilities.name: Fireproof
abilities.text: {Exert} — Ready chosen character. They can't quest for the rest of this turn.

data.flavor_text:
"Arm thyself with this enchanted Shield of Virtue
and this mighty Sword of Truth, for these weapons of
righteousness will triumph over evil." —Flora

data.name: Sword of Truth

abilities.name: Final Enchantment
abilities.text: {Exert} — Banish chosen Villain character.

data.flavor_text: Almost as powerful as True Love's Kiss.

data.name: Ariel

abilities.name: Look at This Stuff
abilities.text: Whenever you play an item, you may ready this character.

data.flavor_text: "You want thingamabobs? I got twenty."

data.name: Aurora

abilities.name: Disarming Beauty
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen character gets -2 {Strength} this turn.

data.flavor_text:
"There was something strange about that voice.
Too beautiful to be real..."
—Prince Phillip

data.name: Aurora

keywords.name: Shift 3
keywords.text: (You may pay 3 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Aurora.)

abilities.name: Protective Embrace
abilities.text: Your other characters gain Ward. (Opponents can't choose them except to challenge.)

data.flavor_text: As the princess slumbered, her power awoke.

data.name: Aurora
data.flavor_text:
"They say if you dream a thing more than once,
it's sure to come true!"

data.name: Belle

abilities.name: Tinker
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you pay 1 {Ink} less for the next item you play this turn.

data.flavor_text:
A little ingenuity and a lot of heart will take you far
in this world.

data.name: Belle

abilities.name: Read a Book
abilities.text: During your turn, you may ink an additional card.

abilities.name: My Favorite Part!
abilities.text: While you have 10 or more cards in your inkwell, this character gets +4 {Lore}.

data.flavor_text:
"Far-off places, daring sword fights, magic spells, a prince
in disguise..."

data.name: Chief Tui

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

data.flavor_text:
"You can always rely on the strength of those who
love you."

data.name: Donald Duck

keywords.name: Ward
keywords.text: (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

data.flavor_text: Walk smarter, not harder.

data.name: Flounder
data.flavor_text:
"Excitement...adventure...danger lurking
around every cor— AAAAAGGH!"

data.name: Gramma Tala

abilities.name: I Will Be with You
abilities.text: When this character is banished, you may put this card into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

data.flavor_text:
Moana: "Is there something you want to tell me?"
Gramma Tala: "Is there something you want to
hear?"

data.name: Hades

abilities.name: Is There a Downside to This?
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may put chosen opposing character into their player's inkwell facedown.

data.flavor_text:
"He's gotta have a weakness, because everybody's
got a weakness."

data.name: Jasmine
data.flavor_text:
"Try to understand. I've never done a thing on my
own. I've never had any real friends....I've never
even been outside the palace walls."

keywords.name: Shift 3
keywords.text: (You may pay 3 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Jasmine.)

abilities.name: Caretaker
abilities.text: When you play this character and whenever she quests, you may remove up to 2 damage from each of your characters.

data.name: Maleficent
data.flavor_text:
"The princess shall indeed grow in grace and beauty,
beloved by all who know her. But before the sun sets
on her sixteenth birthday, she shall prick her finger on
the spindle of a spinning wheel...."

data.name: Maleficent
data.flavor_text:
She had no invitation—and needed no
introduction.

abilities.name: Give It a Try
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you pay 2 {Ink} less for the next item you play this turn.

abilities.name: It Works!
abilities.text: Whenever you play an item, you may draw a card.

data.name: Merlin

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

data.flavor_text:
"What a mess! What a medieval muddle! We'll
have to modernize it."

data.name: Mickey Mouse

abilities.name: Get a Clue
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

data.flavor_text:
Wherever the seaweed had come from, Mickey was
sure of one thing: something fishy was going on.

data.name: Mufasa
data.flavor_text:
"A king must care for all of the creatures in his
kingdom, no matter their size."

data.name: Philoctetes

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

data.flavor_text:
"Ya gotta be the best to train the best. And I train
the best!"

data.name: Robin Hood

abilities.name: Feed the Poor
abilities.text: When you play this character, if an opponent has more cards in their hand than you, draw a card.

abilities.name: Good Shot
abilities.text: During your turn, this character gains Evasive. (They can challenge characters with Evasive.)

data.flavor_text:
"We never rob. We just sort of borrow a bit from those who
can afford it."

data.name: Scar

abilities.name: Insidious Plot
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen opposing character gets -5 {Strength} this turn.

data.flavor_text:
"The best plans involve a little danger. Just not
for me."

data.name: Tamatoa

abilities.name: What Have We Here?
abilities.text: When you play this character and whenever he quests, you may return an item card from your discard to your hand.

abilities.name: Glam
abilities.text: This character gets +1 {Lore} for each item you have in play.

data.flavor_text: "Watch me dazzle like a diamond in the rough!"

data.name: Triton
data.flavor_text: "Isn't ‘Because I said so’ enough of a reason?"

data.name: Develop Your Brain
rules: Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Put one into your hand and the other on the bottom of the deck.
data.flavor_text:
"Knowledge, wisdom—there's the real power!"
—Merlin

data.name: If It's Not Baroque
rules: Return an item card from your discard to your hand.
data.flavor_text: "...Don't fix it."

data.name: Let It Go
rules: (A character with cost 5 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Put chosen character into their player's inkwell facedown and exerted.
data.flavor_text:
It's time to see what I can do
To test the limits and break through

data.name: One Jump Ahead
rules: (A character with cost 2 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.
data.flavor_text:
Gotta eat to live, gotta steal to eat—
Tell you all about it when I got the time

data.name: Work Together
rules: Chosen character gains Support this turn. (Whenever they quest, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)
data.flavor_text:
Pacha: "Put your whole back into it!"
Kuzco: "This is my whole back!"

data.name: Coconut Basket

abilities.name: Consider the Coconut
abilities.text: Whenever you play a character, you may remove up to 2 damage from chosen character.

data.flavor_text:
The coconut is a versatile gift from the gods, used to make
nearly everything—including baskets to carry more coconuts.

data.name: Eye of the Fates

abilities.name: See the Future
abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen character gets +1 {Lore} this turn.

data.flavor_text:
You can change the future once you know what you're
looking at.

data.name: Fishbone Quill

abilities.name: Go Ahead and Sign
abilities.text: {Exert} — Put any card from your hand into your inkwell facedown.

data.flavor_text:
"If you want to cross the bridge, my sweet, you've got
to pay the toll."
—Ursula

data.name: Magic Golden Flower

abilities.name: Healing Pollen
abilities.text: {Exert} — Remove up to 3 damage from chosen character.

data.flavor_text:
"Once upon a time, a single drop of sunlight fell from
the heavens...."
—Flynn Rider

abilities.name: Command
abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen character gains Support this turn. (Whenever they quest, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

data.name: Aladdin
data.flavor_text:
"Oh ho! So the street rat found a sword and a
backbone!"
—Razoul

data.name: Beast

abilities.name: Break
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may banish chosen item.

data.flavor_text: "She'll never see me as anything...but a monster."

data.name: Captain Hook

abilities.name: Double the Powder!
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may return an action card named Fire the Cannons! from your discard to your hand.

data.flavor_text:
"A pretty sight, Mr. Smee. We'll pot 'em like sitting
ducks."

data.name: Captain Hook

keywords.name: Challenger +2
keywords.text: (While challenging, this character gets +2 {Strength}.)

data.flavor_text: He loves to make light of a foe's predicament.

keywords.name: Shift 3
keywords.text: (You may pay 3 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Captain Hook.)

keywords.name: Challenger +3
keywords.text: (While challenging, this character gets +3 {Strength}.)

abilities.name: Stolen Dust
abilities.text: Characters with cost 3 or less can't challenge this character.

data.name: Cerberus
data.flavor_text:
Always vigilant. Always fierce. Always fighting over
the ball.

keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

abilities.name: Stay Alert!
abilities.text: During your turn, your Musketeer characters gain Evasive. (They can challenge characters with Evasive.)

data.name: Gantu

abilities.name: Under Arrest
abilities.text: Characters with cost 2 or less can't challenge your characters.

data.flavor_text: "Relax, enjoy the trip...and don't get any ideas!"

data.name: Goons
data.flavor_text:
They may be useless, but they came with the
castle.

data.name: Hans

abilities.name: Stage a Little Accident
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may deal 1 damage to chosen character.

data.flavor_text: Tired of being last, he decided to cut the line.

data.name: Hercules

keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

data.flavor_text: "You gotta admit, that was pretty heroic."

data.name: Kristoff
data.flavor_text:
Kristoff: "You want to talk about a supply and demand
problem? I sell ice for a living."
Anna: "Ooh, that's a rough business to be in right now. I
mean, that is really—ah, mm. That's unfortunate."

data.name: Kronk
data.flavor_text: "Oh yeah. It's all coming together!"

data.name: Lilo
data.flavor_text:
"Space. That's where aliens come from. And also
tourists!"

data.name: Maui
data.flavor_text:
When the gods gift you a boat, you take it. The boat's
owner is optional.

keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

abilities.name: All For One
abilities.text: Your other Musketeer characters get +1 {Strength}.

data.name: Prince Eric

keywords.name: Challenger +2
keywords.text: (While challenging, this character gets +2 {Strength}.)

data.flavor_text: "I lost her once! I'm not gonna lose her again!"

data.name: Simba

abilities.name: Guess What?
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may draw a card, then choose and discard a card.

data.flavor_text:
"I'm gonna be the best king the Pride Lands have
ever seen!"

data.name: Simba

keywords.name: Challenger +4
keywords.text: (While challenging, this character gets +4 {Strength}.)

abilities.name: Pounce
abilities.text: During your turn, this character gains Evasive. (They can challenge characters with Evasive.)

data.flavor_text: "I'll do whatever it takes to save my kingdom."

data.name: Simba

abilities.name: I Know What I Have to Do
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever this character banishes another character in a challenge, you gain 1 lore.

data.flavor_text:
"I can't hide anymore. It's time to accept my
destiny."

data.name: Starkey

abilities.name: Aye Aye, Captain
abilities.text: While you have a Captain character in play, this character gets +1 {Lore}.

data.flavor_text:
A pirate must be tough, loyal, and strong. "Smart"
doesn't even make the list.

data.name: Te Kā

abilities.name: Seek the Heart
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever this character banishes another character in a challenge, you gain 2 lore.

data.flavor_text:
Maui: "Ever defeat a lava monster?"
Moana: "No. Have you?"

keywords.name: Shift 4
keywords.text: (You may pay 4 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Tinker Bell.)

abilities.name: Rock the Boat
abilities.text: When you play this character, deal 1 damage to each opposing character.

abilities.name: Puny Pirate!
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever this character banishes another character in a challenge, you may deal 2 damage to chosen opposing character.

data.name: Tinker Bell

abilities.name: Battle Plans
abilities.text: {Exert} — Draw a card, then choose and discard a card.

data.flavor_text: Sometimes all you need is a little tactical genius.

data.name: A Whole New World
rules: (A character with cost 5 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Each player discards their hand and draws 7 cards.
data.flavor_text: Shining, shimmering, splendid...

data.name: Break
rules: Banish chosen item.
data.flavor_text: No one throws a tantrum like a beast.

data.name: Fire the Cannons!
rules: Deal 2 damage to chosen character.
data.flavor_text:
Captain Hook: "Double the powder and shorten the
fuse!"
Mr. Smee: "Shorten the powder and double the fuse!"

data.name: Grab Your Sword
rules: (A character with cost 5 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Deal 2 damage to each opposing character.
data.flavor_text:
We don't like
What we don't understand
In fact, it scares us

data.name: Ransack
rules: Draw 2 cards, then choose and discard 2 cards.
data.flavor_text: Who has time to read labels?

data.name: Smash
rules: Deal 3 damage to chosen character.
data.flavor_text: "Go away!"

data.name: Beast's Mirror

abilities.name: Show Me
abilities.text: {Exert} — If you have no cards in your hand, draw a card.

data.flavor_text:
Ashamed of his monstrous form, the Beast concealed
himself inside his castle, with a magic mirror as his only
window to the outside world.

data.name: Frying Pan

abilities.name: Clang!
abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen character can't challenge during their next turn.

data.flavor_text:
It's a fine piece of cookware, but as a weapon it's truly
stunning.

data.name: Musketeer Tabard

abilities.name: All For One and One For All
abilities.text: Whenever one of your characters with Bodyguard is banished, you may draw a card.

data.flavor_text: There's no such thing as a lone musketeer.

data.name: Plasma Blaster

abilities.name: Quick Shot
abilities.text: {Exert} — Deal 1 damage to chosen character.

data.flavor_text:
"You don't have to say ‘pew pew’ when you use it, but it
doesn't hurt."
—Lilo, galactic hero
